content: Urgent email asking user to reset password through a suspicious login link.
summary: Credential harvesting attempt using urgent language and malicious link.

content: Multiple failed logins from a foreign IP followed by a successful login.
summary: Potential account compromise due to abnormal login pattern.

content: Employee sent spreadsheet containing SSNs to an external email address.
summary: Sensitive data exfiltration involving personally identifiable information.

content: Weekly internal HR newsletter with no attachments or suspicious links.
